regions.text: Before money, men did business by exchanging goods they were willing to give up for things they wanted more. This still happens today.
Money made trade easier and business better. If you have money, you can buy what you want without finding something to exchange.
exchange: giving one thing for another. willing: ready to do something. still: up to now. trade: exchange of things or money.
FUTURE: will trade, will invent. PRESENT: trade(s), invent(s). PAST: traded, invented.
